name: Feeble
drawback_effect: You take a -2 penalty on Strength-, Dexterity-, and Constitution-based ability checks and skill checks.

name: Frail
drawback_effect:
Subtract 1 from the number of hit points you gain at each level. This flaw can reduce the number of hit points you gain to 0 (but not below).

Special

You must have a Constitution of 4 or higher to take this flaw.
description: You are thin and weak of frame.

name: Inattentive
drawback_effect: You take a -4 penalty on Listen checks and Spot checks.
description: You are particularly unaware of your surroundings.

name: Meager Fortitude
drawback_effect: You take a -3 penalty on Fortitude saves.
description: You are sickly and weak of stomach.

name: Murky-Eyed
drawback_effect: In combat, every time you attack an opponent that has concealment, roll your miss chance twice. If either or both results indicate that you miss, your attack fails.

name: Noncombatant
drawback_effect: You take a -2 penalty on all melee attack rolls.
description: You are relatively inept at melee combat.

name: Pathetic
drawback_effect:
Reduce one of your ability scores by 2.

Special

You cannot take this flaw if the total of your ability modifiers is 8 or higher.
description: You are weaker in an attribute than you should be.

name: Poor Reflexes
drawback_effect: You take a -3 penalty on Reflex saves.
description: You often zig when you should have zagged.

name: Shaky
drawback_effect: You take a -2 penalty on all ranged attack rolls.
description: You are relatively poor at ranged combat.

name: Slow
drawback_effect:
Your base land speed is halved (round down to the nearest 5-foot interval).

Special

You must have a base land speed of at least 20 feet to take this flaw.

name: Unreactive
drawback_effect: You take a -6 penalty on initiative checks.
description: You are slow to react to danger.

name: Vulnerable
drawback_effect: You take a -1 penalty to Armor Class.
description: You are not good at defending yourself.

name: Weak Will
drawback_effect:
You take a -3 penalty on Will saves.
